_comment: Anti-slop quality gate — mutation testing. Scoped to the unit-tested pure-logic layer (src/lib/**), the same modules vitest.config.ts narrows coverage to. Mutation score here is the real test-quality signal: high line coverage + low mutation score = tests that run but assert nothing. UI components (jsdom) and Next.js page/layout files are integration-tested, not unit-tested, so they are out of mutation scope (mutating them yields noise, not signal). Phase 1 = baseline only; no thresholds.high/low break gate yet.
